acceptance_boundaries.description: No item may appear in both in_scope and out_of_scope.
Any scope change requires a new governed stage and receipt.

assumptions: R10 NUF handoff is READY and its bundle checksum passes.

change_control.process: Scope changes must be explicitly routed through a new handoff-authorized governed stage.

out_of_scope.item: implementation of downstream RRP repair logic
out_of_scope.reason: RRP is a later stage with separate contracts.
Export promotion is stage 23 and must not occur during SSO.

scope_statement: Define the exact bounded work for the next governed MPP stage, including explicit exclusions and change-control rules.
